case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. SHIRLEY MNECHAVEZ REYES

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED SEP-12-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT REYES, SHIRLEY MNECHAVEZ
